<?php namespace Spatie\Ignition\ErrorPage; class Renderer { /** * @param array<string, mixed> $data * * @return void */ public function render(array $data, string $viewPath): void { $viewFile = $viewPath; extract($data, EXTR_OVERWRITE); include $viewFile; } public function renderAsString(array $date, string $viewPath): string { ob_start(); $this->render($date, $viewPath); return ob_get_clean(); } }
